full_text:
He Xiong 何雄
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
He Xiong (何雄)was born in Kuaiji. Turned against his lord just as his lord was fighting He Qi, they both lost. He Xiong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
